context: Tests whether the agent uses timestamp comparison, identifies DiffNote types for inline comments, validates timestamps are in UTC/ISO8601 format, and properly tracks review activity.

checklist.name: Compares timestamps
checklist.description: Includes logic to compare or sort comment timestamps to identify recent activity

checklist.name: Identifies DiffNote type
checklist.description: Checks the Type field to distinguish between DiffNote (inline code comments) and general comments

checklist.name: Processes Date field
checklist.description: Extracts and uses the Date field from the comment output

checklist.name: Handles ISO8601 format
checklist.description: Treats or references timestamps as ISO8601 format (no manual conversion to other formats)

checklist.name: Validates response
checklist.description: Checks that the fetched data contains expected fields before processing

checklist.name: Identifies inline comments
checklist.description: Specifically counts or flags Type: DiffNote comments as pending inline reviews

checklist.name: Authentication setup
checklist.description: Documents or handles GITLAB_TOKEN/GITLAB_PAT environment variable requirement

checklist.name: Error handling
checklist.description: Includes checks for missing credentials or invalid MR URLs with appropriate error messages
